query:
INSERT INTO inventory (id, item_id, qty_on_hand, qty_reserved)
           VALUES (uuid_generate_v4(), $1, GREATEST(0::numeric, $2), 0)
           ON CONFLICT (item_id)
           DO UPDATE SET qty_on_hand = GREATEST(0::numeric, inventory.qty_on_hand + $2),
                         updated_at = NOW()
